text:
Market today: Mixed signals for tech. Palantir's AI strength offers a tailwind, but Tesla's sharp drop hints at underlying sector volatility. Tariffs and political influence also remain factors.

Your holdings: SOXL (-28.7%) is a "SELL" and needs immediate attention due to its leveraged nature and significant loss. QQQI (-1.86%) is a "TRIM" and near its stop. SPAL (-9.58%), a new leveraged ETF, is also close to its stop. Remember, margin amplifies all these moves.

Watch: Monitor your leveraged positions closely. Also, keep an eye on SMH and XLK for potential scanner-backed entry points on dips.

Bottom line: Prioritize risk management on your leveraged and underperforming positions in this volatile tech environment.
plays: SOXL is a "SELL" and down 28.7%. Review your stop at 200; given its leverage and decay, consider tightening it or exiting if risk tolerance is breached.
QQQI is a "TRIM" and near its 52 stop. Consider reducing your position to manage risk, especially on margin.
SMH scanner suggests a buy on dip (entry 586.43-584.71, stop 580.88). Watch for this entry to add to your existing position.
